title: To The Teachers Of The Young
content:
How large thy task, O teacher of the young,
    To take the ravelled threads by parents flung
    With careless hands, and through consummate care
    To weave a fabric, fine and firm and fair.
    God's uncompleted work is thine to do - 
    Be brave and true!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Ella Wheeler Wilcox, titled "To The Teachers Of The Young", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
